heading: Omitted
label: 100a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, which was from the Department of Defense Appropriation Act, 1983, , , , 1851, prohibited use of funds available to Department of Defense agencies for acquisition, construction, or operation of certain scrap-processing facilities, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.
